hooks.command: cd '/Volumes/BriteBrain/Projects/Harness Agent' && lw=$(grep "^LOOP_WEIGHT:" .sessions/session_tokens.md 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); lw=${lw:-0}; if [ "$lw" -gt 50 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[C0.5-REQUIRED] LOOP_WEIGHT=$lw > 50 — emit [compact-required] as FIRST line · write compact_state.md · STOP new work" >&2; elif [ "$lw" -gt 30 ] 2>/dev/null; then echo "[C0.5-warn] LOOP_WEIGHT=$lw > 30 — emit [compact-warn] as FIRST line (Skill · Remaining · Resume — all 3 mandatory)" >&2; fi; exit 0

cd '/Volumes/BriteBrain/Projects/Harness Agent' && TNAME="${TOOL_NAME:-}" && case "$TNAME" in Agent|Workflow|WebFetch|WebSearch) W=3 ;; Write|mcp__*) W=2 ;; *) W=1 ;; esac && cur=$(grep "^LOOP_WEIGHT:" .sessions/session_tokens.md 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}') && new=$(( ${cur:-0} + W )) && sed -i '' "s/^LOOP_WEIGHT:.*/LOOP_WEIGHT: $new/" .sessions/session_tokens.md 2>/dev/null || true
